name: lingxi
description: 灵犀 — 数字员工平台 monorepo

scripts.dev: concurrently -n hermes,gateway,web -c yellow,cyan,magenta --kill-others-on-fail 'pnpm dev:hermes' 'pnpm dev:gateway' 'pnpm dev:web'
scripts.dev:gateway: cd apps/gateway && DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env.local pnpm exec tsx -r dotenv/config src/index.ts
